prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约 22330→36824→28070→27577→30543，整体波动较大，2022 年因试卷难度和考生结构变化出现明显后移，2023–2024 年有所回升，2025 年再度后移至约 30543 名，近 3 年呈震荡后移态势；该校在安徽物理类招生计划 2021 年 128 人、2022 年 128 人、2023 年 130 人、2024 年 148 人、2025 年 211 人，持续扩招；2026 年计划 261 人，较 2025 年再扩招约 23.7%，招生名额大幅增加，竞争压力显著上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名从 2021 年第 113 名持续上升至 2026 年第 97 名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和社会认可度逐年增强；2022 年曾因学校管理舆情出现偏负面评价，但近年声誉趋于平稳；抖音热度排名第 63 位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等，未见明显报考热度异常信号；无投档断档记录；化学工程与技术为 A- 学科，是该校唯一 A- 及以上评级学科，与化工类招生专业直接对应；机械、材料、电气、计算机等工科专业虽未获 A 类评级，但均为社会需求旺盛领域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在 2026 年专业热度分析中均为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，社会报考热度高；安徽省 2026 年高考总人数约 45.1 万，按近年物理类占比约 69% 估算，物理类考生约 31.3 万，较 2025 年（约 32.1 万）略有减少；省控线 2024–2025 年物理类本科批稳定在 461–465 分，特殊类型招生控制线稳定在 514 分，卷面难度基本持平；太原理工大学位于山西省，在安徽无本地招生倾斜；该校在安徽招生人数占全国总招生比例约 4%–5%，属中等水平，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次震荡后移趋势、2026 年大幅扩招约 23.7% 带来的竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续上升对报考吸引力的正向作用、以及热门工科专业持续高热的社会需求，在 2025 年基准 30543 名基础上；考虑学校排名提升和考生总数略减的缓和因素，适度回调后预测最低位次约 34836 名，区间 34336–35336 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 22330→36824→28070→27577→30543, showing significant fluctuations. In 2022, due to changes in exam difficulty and candidate structure, there was a notable backward shift. Rankings recovered somewhat in 2023–2024, but shifted backward again in 2025 to about 30543, indicating a volatile backward trend over the past 3 years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui was 128 in 2021, 128 in 2022, 130 in 2023, 148 in 2024, and 211 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 261, an increase of about 23.7% compared to 2025, with a significant increase in enrollment quotas, leading to a marked rise in competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Main List has steadily risen from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and social recognition. In 2022, there was some negative public opinion due to school management incidents, but its reputation has stabilized in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd (rated as 'average'), with moderate short video exposure and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. There are no records of enrollment gaps. Chemical Engineering and Technology is an A- discipline, the only discipline rated A- or above at this university, directly corresponding to the chemical engineering enrollment majors. Although majors like Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science have not received A-level ratings, they are in high demand in society.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2026 major popularity analysis, with high social application demand. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Anhui in 2026 is about 451,000. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 69%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 313,000, a slight decrease from about 321,000 in 2025. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch remained stable at 461–465 points in 2024–2025, and the special type enrollment control line remained stable at 514 points, indicating roughly equal exam difficulty. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Shanxi Province and has no local enrollment preference in Anhui. The proportion of its enrollment in Anhui to its total national enrollment is about 4%–5%, which is moderate, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the volatile backward trend in historical rankings, the intensified competition due to a significant enrollment expansion of about 23.7% in 2026, the positive effect of the university's rising Shanghai Ranking on application attractiveness, and the sustained high social demand for popular engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 30543, and taking into account the mitigating factors of the university's ranking improvement and a slight decrease in total candidate numbers, after moderate adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is about 34836, with a range of 34336–35336.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 34836, with a range of 34336–35336. If your ranking is within this range, it is recommended to use Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (within 34336), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Experimental Class, Computer Experimental Class, etc.). If your ranking is near the upper bound (outside 35336), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 advantageous disciplines (Chemical Engineering and Technology A-) while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 5304→4895→4968→4654→4725, showing a slight fluctuating forward trend overall. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui was 13 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 10 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 10, the same as 2025, maintaining a stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In recent years, its reputation has been stable with no significant negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd (rated as 'average'), with moderate exposure. There is no record of enrollment gaps. Chemical Engineering and Technology A- is the university's only A- or above discipline, which is not directly related to History Category enrollment majors. The main enrollment majors for History Category are Law and Accounting.

预测结论.text: Combining the slight forward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan being the same as 2025, the positive effect of the university's continuously rising Soft Science ranking on application attractiveness, and the mitigating factor of a slight decrease in the total number of History Category candidates in Anhui, based on the 2025 benchmark of 4725, and considering the slight decrease in candidate numbers and the university's ranking improvement, after a moderate forward adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is about 4695, with a range of 4195–5195.
